Class Unit

java.lang.Object
component.Unit
Direct Known Subclasses:
Heroes, Monster
public abstract class Unit extends Object
Abstract base class representing a combat unit in the game.

A Unit defines core combat attributes such as attack, defense, health points, and elemental affinity. Both Hero and Monster classes extend this base abstraction.

This class is responsible for:

  • Damage calculation and defense reduction
  • Elemental damage modifier application
  • HP management and death state tracking
  • Base scaling configuration for heroes and monsters

Subclasses should override skill-related behavior where necessary.

      private String name
      Display name of the unit

      Base attack value

      Elemental affinity of this unit

  • Constructor Details

    • Unit

      public Unit(String name, double atk, double maxHp, double def)
      Constructs a new Unit with base combat stats.
      Parameters:
      name - unit name
      atk - attack value (must be >= 0)
      maxHp - maximum HP (must be >= 0)
      def - defense value (must be >= 0)

  • Method Details

    • takeDamage

      public double takeDamage(double dmg)
      Applies incoming damage to this unit after defense reduction.
      Parameters:
      dmg - raw incoming damage
      Returns:
      actual damage taken (after reduction)

    • dmgReduction

      public double dmgReduction(double dmg)
      Reduces incoming damage using defense.
      Parameters:
      dmg - raw damage
      Returns:
      damage after defense mitigation (never negative)

    • attack

      public double attack(Unit target, double rawDamage)
      Performs an elemental attack on a target. Final damage = rawDamage × elemental modifier
      Parameters:
      target - target unit
      rawDamage - base damage before modifier
      Returns:
      actual damage dealt

    • isDead

      public boolean isDead()
      Checks whether this unit is dead.
      Returns:
      true if HP less than or equal 0

    • getHpPercent

      public double getHpPercent()
      Returns HP percentage (0–100).
      Returns:
      current HP as percentage of max HP

    • castSkill

      public void castSkill(SkillType type, Target target)
      Casts a skill. Subclasses should override this method to implement skill logic.
      Parameters:
      type - skill type
      target - skill target

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns:
      unit name

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets unit name

    • getAtk

      public double getAtk()
      Returns:
      attack value

    • setAtk

      public void setAtk(double atk)
      Sets attack value (must be >= 0)

    • getDef

      public double getDef()
      Returns:
      defense value

    • setDef

      public void setDef(double def)
      Sets defense value (must be >= 0)

    • getHp

      public double getHp()
      Returns:
      current HP

    • setHp

      public void setHp(double hp)
      Sets HP, clamped between 0 and maxHp.

    • getMaxHp

      public double getMaxHp()
      Returns:
      maximum HP

    • setMaxHp

      public void setMaxHp(double maxHp)
      Sets maximum HP. If current HP exceeds new max HP, it will be reduced.

    • getElement

      public Element getElement()
      Returns:
      elemental type

    • setElement

      public void setElement(Element element)
      Sets elemental type
